results.title: Meta Shares Fall After Raising Outlook for Capital Spending in 2026 - Bloomberg
Meta just bumped its 2026 capex forecast up to as much as $145 billion for the AI boom-and investors flinched
Meta Beats Revenue Expectations, Boosts Capital Spending Forecast for 2026
Meta posts an earnings and revenue beat - and a huge capex bill
Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, Microsoft Earnings to Arrive in 80-Second Window - Bloomberg

summary: Q1 2026: Revenue +33% YoY to $56.3B (beat), EPS $10.44 (beat $6.65 est by 57%). Capex guidance raised to $125-145B. Stock fell ~7-9% after-hours on capex concern + DAP miss (3.56B vs 3.62B est). Laid off ~8,000 employees (10% workforce). New Oklahoma data center announced. Debuted Muse Spark foundation model.
